description:
Smart. Focused. Email.

Fast, cross-platform email designed to filter out the noise - so you can focus on what's important.
We’ve made lots of improvements and fixes.
- The Undo Send timer: Catch last-minute mistakes before they reach your recipients. Head to Spark Settings > General > Undo Send Timer to give yourself more time to cancel an email send.
- New composer from Drafts: Writing multiple emails at once? Now you can open extra composer windows directly from an existing draft using the same shortcut (Ctrl + Alt + N).
- Rename meeting transcript headers: Keep your meeting notes tidier — open a note and click on its header to replace the auto-generated version with a custom title.
- Delete individual emails from a thread: Click “...” next to any email in a thread to delete it.
- Open transcripts and notes in Calendar: Switch from your Calendar to Meeting Notes in a single click — events with transcripts now include a “Open in Meeting Notes” button.
- Close ‘More’ more easily: Click ‘More’ once to reveal your full folder list. Click it a second time to dismiss the menu.
- "Auto-download attachment" option: Manage your bandwidth and digital safety — choose whether attachments load automatically. Head to Settings > General to switch this on or off.
- More fixes than we can mention here. :)
If you have any questions or feedback, contact us at support@sparkmailapp.com.

P.S. If you encounter any issues with the automatic update, please use the following link to download the update manually:
https://downloads.sparkmailapp.com/Spark3/win/dist/3.25.2.115680/Spark.exe
